zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Chichley於1439年3月9日出生在英國坎布利其爾維波爾時，她的父親John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London27歲，母親Margery Knolleys23歲。她於1464年與Robert Barrett在英國英格蘭艾可奧瑟特結婚。她去世於1501年10月1日在英國英格蘭艾可艾維勒享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Chichley于1439年3月9日出生在英国坎布利其爾維波爾时，她的父亲John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London27岁，母亲Margery Knolleys23岁。她于1464年与Robert Barrett在英国英格兰艾可奧瑟特结婚。她去世于1501年10月1日在英国英格兰艾可艾維勒享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Chichley was born on 9 March 1439, in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, was 27 and her mother, Margery Knolleys, was 23. She married Robert Barrett in 1464, in Orsett, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She died on 1 October 1501, in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Chichley est née le 9 mars 1439, à Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Knolleys, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Barrett en 1464, à Orsett, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1501, à Aveley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Chichley am 9. März 1439 in Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London 27 und ihre Mutter Margery Knolleys 23. Sie hat 1464 in Orsett, Essex, England, United Kingdom Robert Barrett geheiratet. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1501 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Aveley, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Chichley è nata il il 9 marzo 1439 nel Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margery Knolleys, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Barrett nel 1464, nel Orsett, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 1 ottobre 1501, nel Aveley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Chichleyが1439年3月9日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアウィンプオルで生まれた時，父John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of Londonは27歳，母Margery Knolleysは23歳であった。1464年にイギリスイギリスエセックスオルセットでRobert Barrettと結婚した。彼女は1501年10月1日にイギリスイギリスエセックスエイベリーで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Chichley(이)가 1439년 3월 9일 영국 캄브리지실르 위포일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Knolleys(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 오세트에서 Robert Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1501년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에벨리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Chichley nasceu em 9 de março de 1439, em Wimpole, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Knolleys, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Barrett em 1464, em Orsett, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1501, em Aveley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Chichley родилась 9 марта 1439 г. в местности вимпол, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Knolleys, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Barrett в 1464 г. в местности орсетт, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 1 октября 1501 г. в местности авели, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
